findings.title: Backup policy gap
findings.detail: No automated backup snapshots meet the stated twelve-hour RPO; manual exports are ad hoc.

findings.title: Geo-redundant storage disabled
findings.detail: Storage redundancy is Locally Redundant Storage only — multi-region recovery is unspecified.

findings.title: Restore rehearsals
findings.detail: No documented quarterly restore game day attaches SQL restore evidence to CAB records.
